name: Salatsauce #1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wooden salad bowl, crush the peppercorns into a coarse powder.
2. Add the salt and mustard to the crushed peppercorns.
3. Stir in the olive oil and tarragon vinegar.
4. Place the lettuce leaves on top of the mixture.
5. Chill in the refrigerator until serving time.
6. At serving time, stir gently until all the lettuce leaves are coated.
